title: Targa (TRGP) Q2 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Miss
text: Targa (TRGP) anticipates adjusted EBITDA in the $3.5-$3.7 billion range, growth capital expenditures in the $2.2-$2 billion range, and net maintenance capital expenditures of $175 million for 2023.

title: Targa Resources Corp. to Participate in Investor Conferences
text: HOUSTON, Aug. 15, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) ("Targa" or the "Company") announced today that representatives from the Company will participate in investor meetings at the following investor conferences:

title: Oil & Gas Are Moving In August, Here Are The 3 Industry Favorites
text: Whether it is the forces of commodity cycles, the changing tides of a world economy, or even straight manipulation from the most prominent players who hear whispers from OPEC's next decision, the only certainty is that oil and gas prices are swinging hard. Crude oil has swung from below $60 per barrel in the last quarter to above $80 per barrel as of today's new quarter, and natural gas has followed a similar path.

title: Targa Resources Corp. Reports Second Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: HOUSTON, Aug. 03, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) (“TRGP,” the “Company” or “Targa”) today reported second quarter 2023 results.
